questionHtml: Using a production possibilities curve (PPC) diagram to illustrate comparative advantage, explain why the EU would export cars to Indonesia and Indonesia would export clothing to the EU (paragraph [2]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The x and y axes can be cars and clothing.
